primary.description: Deep Burgundy - Classic, warm, Catholic-community feel. Used for primary CTAs and key headings.

accent.description: Muted Gold - Used for badges, subtle accents, thin rules, and active states.

background.description: Warm Ivory/Cream backgrounds for a comfortable, non-sterile feel.

typography.rationale: Fraunces offers a warm, dignified, and editorial serif that evokes a sense of heritage and civic duty, perfect for a Catholic Sabha. Manrope is a highly legible, clean humanist sans that balances the serif without feeling too sterile or 'tech-like'.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7A1F2B] text-white hover:bg-[#5C1720] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary_outline: bg-transparent border border-[#7A1F2B] text-[#7A1F2B] hover:bg-[#F2E9EB] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost_icon: bg-transparent text-[#5C5A56] hover:text-[#7A1F2B] hover:bg-[#F2E9EB] p-2 rounded-full transition-colors

cards.container: bg-white border border-[#E8E2D9] rounded-xl p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1
cards.image_placeholder: w-16 h-16 rounded bg-[#F5EFE6] flex items-center justify-center text-[#B8860B]

badges.category: bg-[#F8F3E6] text-[#B8860B] border border-[#E8D9B4] px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.souvenir_page: bg-[#F2E9EB] text-[#7A1F2B] px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold

filters.chip_default: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-[#E8E2D9] text-[#5C5A56] hover:border-[#B8860B] hover:bg-[#F8F3E6] transition-colors text-sm font-medium cursor-pointer
filters.chip_active: px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-[#7A1F2B] text-white border border-[#7A1F2B] shadow-sm text-sm font-medium cursor-pointer

navbar.container: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E8E2D9]
navbar.wordmark: font-heading font-semibold text-xl text-[#7A1F2B] flex items-center gap-2

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default scale (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Use generous padding (py-20 to py-24) for main sections to let content breathe.
layout.hero_section: Asymmetric layout. Left side: Warm, left-aligned typography (H1 + subtitle), primary CTA, and a subtle horizontal gold rule (#B8860B) separating the title and description. Right side: A high-quality, warm-toned image of the community or church interior, slightly offset with a soft rounded edge or framed within a gentle arch (radius).
layout.accessibility: Ensure #7A1F2B (Burgundy) has at least 4.5:1 contrast against #FDFBF7 (Ivory). It easily passes. Use text-shadow if placing white text over images.

image_urls.description: Warm interior of a church with rows of chairs. Perfect for the hero section background or right-side visual.
A row of lit candles sitting on top of a table. Good for a decorative image break or footer background with a heavy dark overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the sponsor cards; build them with raw Tailwind HTML divs to perfectly match the defined border, ivory hover states, and spacing in this spec.
Use Lucide icons for the Call, WhatsApp, Email, Website, and Souvenir (book/file) actions.
Ensure the hero section uses the warm ivory background (#FDFBF7) and not pure white.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, particularly filter chips and sponsor card action buttons.
Do NOT use glassmorphism except for the subtle blur on the sticky navbar. Keep surfaces solid and earthy.
Ensure responsive card grid matches specs: 1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 4 desktop.
